methodsAttempted.query: site:kth.se KTH generative AI education guidelines students examination
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl web search found official KTH student guidance, staff course-template guidance, teacher guidance, and supporting intranet pages.
Firecrawl web search found official assessment and course-specific generative AI guidance, plus course/workshop results rejected as too narrow.
Firecrawl web search found official KTH legal/privacy guidance, general IT AI recommendations, and Microsoft Copilot Chat guidance.
Firecrawl web search found official academic-integrity and assessment guidance, plus course-specific and news items rejected for policy scope.

methodsAttempted.query: KTH Royal Institute of Technology generative AI policy guidance students teachers
methodsAttempted.notes: Public search confirmed that the high-value results were on official kth.se and intra.kth.se domains; no non-official evidence was used for approved claims.

artifacts.summary: Firecrawl-first discovery found public official KTH guidance on generative AI for students, teachers, legal/privacy handling, information security, Copilot Chat, assessment, and academic integrity. Rejected sources were official but too narrow, event/news-only, or research-showcase-only. Approved claims are limited to direct text from official KTH pages and are staged as agent_reviewed only.

artifacts.title: KTH Royal Institute of Technology generative AI staged source review
artifacts.summary: Staged review of official KTH guidance found public official sources covering student and teacher generative AI guidance, course-specific assessment rules, academic-integrity disclosure, privacy/GDPR handling, IT information-sharing recommendations, and Microsoft Copilot Chat for employees. All claims remain unpromoted agent-reviewed candidates.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Some KTH sources are public intranet pages aimed at staff; this staged bundle does not assert human review, canonical publication, or an official university endorsement beyond the linked source text.
Single-course course memos, workshop listings, news/advisory pages, and research showcases were rejected as evidence for university-level policy claims.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
